ab: Tona pahanhanan, tayra i Posong miliso’ cifakian kako ato kaka to fafahiyan.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: Nai Taypak mikalic to kasoling a tayra i Posong kami.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: Tahira i Posong, parakatay cifaki to paliding a militemoh tamiyanan.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: I ngataay no ciyataw ko loma’ nifaki, parakat to paliding caho caho tahira to.
ch: 叔叔家就在車站附近，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: Ira ko ta’angayay a pipakaenan i ngata no loma’ nifaki, citingsa kami matatoor tayra i pipakaenan.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: I pipakaenan, keriden nifaki pariri’ to siri ato mikalic to efa kami.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: Dadaya, malahakelong tayra i maci a malafi kami.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃晚餐。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: Adihayay ko paliding i maci, mansa pakaotopay tayra kami.
ch: 街上車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: Ya mamiliyas i, faheka matakaway ko otopay, saka mikalic to paso kami.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: Minokay to kami tayra i Taypak, haiken maxeraay to nifaki koya matakaway a otopay hakiya!
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有!
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
